file_insights.changes: Added Session 5 completion details documenting make check verification with comprehensive test results and marked Phase 1 as BUILD COMPLETE
file_insights.significance: Records final verification step completion showing 349 total tests passed across all test categories

file_insights.changes: Updated subtask-1-5 status from 'pending' to 'completed' with detailed notes on test results and timestamp
file_insights.significance: Formally marks verification step as complete in the implementation plan structure

patterns_discovered.description: Verification subtask uses complete test suite (make check) to validate all code changes across multiple test types
Tests are organized by type: unit tests (318), integration harness tests (dispatcher: 10, job_control: 17, merge_gate: 4), additional tests (91), doc tests (1)
Clippy checks run with -D warnings flag (deny warnings) ensuring zero warnings allowed
This verification step was gated on completion of all 4 prior subtasks (rename, bash test, zsh test, fish test)

gotchas_discovered.description: Session 5 was marked as SUCCESS but involved no code changes - only validation that previous work passed tests
gotchas_discovered.impact: Prevents confusion about whether new functionality was added or just verified

gotchas_discovered.description: 349 total tests is substantial; easy to miss understanding the breakdown without reading the progress notes carefully
gotchas_discovered.impact: Verification phase requires understanding all test categories to assess coverage

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully completed Phase 1 (Rename Command) by verifying all tests and linting passes
approach_outcome.completion_evidence: All tests pass with zero warnings; build-progress.txt and implementation_plan.json both document successful completion

recommendations.rationale: build-progress.txt explicitly states 'Ready for QA review' and all verification criteria are met
349 tests across 4 harness types provides solid baseline; track regression if future changes reduce this count
The -D warnings flag enforcement prevented warning accumulation; continue enforcing this in future phases
Phase 1 is marked BUILD COMPLETE; archive implementation_plan.json and build-progress.txt as reference for Phase 2
